articles.title: ElevenLabs 员工股权出售冲刺 220 亿美元估值：AI 语音独角兽估值 5 个月翻倍
articles.title_en: ElevenLabs Tender Offer Targets $22B Valuation: AI Voice Unicorn Doubles in 5 Months
articles.summary: 7 月 3 日彭博社报道，AI 语音独角兽 ElevenLabs 正与投资者就员工股权出售（Tender Offer）展开初步谈判，若交易顺利完成估值将达 220 亿美元（约人民币 1490 亿元），预计 2026 年 9 月前完成。此次并非新一轮融资，而是新投资者购买员工及早期股东持有股份。ElevenLabs 上一轮主要融资为 2026 年 2 月 D 轮 5 亿美元、投后 110 亿美元，由红杉、a16z、ICONIQ 领投；5 月英伟达追加投资加入。公司 ARR 已突破 5 亿美元，客户含德国电信、BCG、Revolut。
articles.summary_en: On July 3, Bloomberg reported that AI voice unicorn ElevenLabs is in early talks with investors on a tender offer that would peg valuation at $22B (RMB 149B) if completed—expected by September 2026. This is not a new funding round but new investors buying employee and early-shareholder stakes. ElevenLabs' prior main round was February 2026's $500M Series D at $11B post-money, led by Sequoia, a16z, and ICONIQ; NVIDIA joined via a May extension. The company's ARR crossed $500M, with customers including Deutsche Telekom, BCG, and Revolut.
articles.source: 彭博社 / 智东西 / TechCrunch / ElevenLabs Blog
articles.source_en: Bloomberg / Zhidx / TechCrunch / ElevenLabs Blog
articles.content: ElevenLabs 由两位波兰创业者 Mati Staniszewski（CEO）和 Piotr Dąbkowski（CTO）于 2022 年联合创办。斯坦尼斯泽夫斯基曾任职 Palantir，东布科夫斯基曾在谷歌做机器学习工程师——两人因早年在波兰观看低质量配音电影经历萌生创业想法。产品覆盖 AI 语音生成、语音克隆、TTS、实时语音交互能力，广告 / 有声书 / 影视 / 呼叫中心 / 企业培训五大商业化场景全面铺开。5 个月估值从 110 亿翻至 220 亿背后的关键数据：ARR 突破 5 亿美元，客户既有德国电信、BCG 这类大 B 端，也有 Revolut 这样的高频消费金融平台。相比 OpenAI Voice、Google TTS、微软 Azure Voice 这些巨头产品，ElevenLabs 的核心壁垒是 43 种语言的语音克隆保真度和实时对话延迟，这直接决定了呼叫中心与企业培训两个高单价场景的可用性。英伟达 5 月入股，是自研芯片圈内典型的「投重要客户以锁算力」逻辑。
articles.content_en: ElevenLabs was co-founded in 2022 by Polish entrepreneurs Mati Staniszewski (CEO) and Piotr Dąbkowski (CTO). Staniszewski was previously at Palantir; Dąbkowski was a machine-learning engineer at Google—both were inspired by their childhood experience of poorly dubbed films in Poland. Products span AI voice generation, voice cloning, text-to-speech, and real-time voice interaction, deployed across advertising, audiobooks, film/TV, call centers, and enterprise training. Behind the 5-month valuation double from $11B to $22B are two key numbers: ARR of $500M and a customer base that includes both large B2B names like Deutsche Telekom and BCG, and high-frequency consumer-finance platforms like Revolut. Compared to OpenAI Voice, Google TTS, and Microsoft Azure Voice from the giants, ElevenLabs' moat is voice-cloning fidelity across 43 languages plus real-time-conversation latency—both directly determine viability in the high-ticket call-center and enterprise-training scenarios. NVIDIA's May stake follows the familiar 「invest in key customers to lock compute demand」 playbook.

articles.title: DeepSeek V4 官宣 7 月中旬上线：首次引入 API 峰谷阶梯定价机制
articles.title_en: DeepSeek V4 Slated for Mid-July Launch: First Peak-Valley Tiered API Pricing
articles.summary: DeepSeek 官方 7 月 1 日宣布 V4 正式版将于 7 月中旬上线，最大变化是首次在国内开源大模型 API 中引入「峰谷分时定价」——高峰时段 Token 价格上浮约为此前一倍，低谷时段大幅优惠。这一机制目的是引导用户错峰调用、缓解算力波峰压力，标志中国大模型商业化进入精细化运营阶段。同期华为开源盘古大模型 openPangu 2.0 Flash、稀宇科技开源 MiniMax M3 旗舰模型，2026 上半年中国开源模型阵营完成新一轮阵形升级。
articles.summary_en: DeepSeek officially announced on July 1 that V4 will go live in mid-July, with its biggest change being the first 「peak-valley tiered pricing」 API model in China's open-source LLM camp—peak-hour Token prices roughly double the prior rate, while off-peak hours receive deep discounts. The mechanism guides users to shift workloads off-peak, easing compute-peak stress, and marks China's LLM commercialization entering a fine-grained operations phase. Alongside, Huawei open-sourced openPangu 2.0 Flash and MiniMax open-sourced its flagship M3—H1 2026 completes another lineup upgrade in China's open-source model camp.
articles.source: DeepSeek 官方 / 新智元 / 量子位 / 智源社区 / 36 氪
articles.source_en: DeepSeek official / Xinzhiyuan / Qbitai / BAAI Community / 36Kr
articles.content: DeepSeek V4 峰谷定价的产业意义超过定价本身。过去三年国内大模型 API 主流是「统一定价 + 无差别按量计费」，价格战主导了 2024-2025 年的行业格局。V4 首次尝试「时段动态定价」，模仿电网、云主机 spot 实例的经典调度手段——高峰时段涨价抑制非紧急调用，低谷时段降价把闲置算力兑现。这一机制的可行性建立在 DeepSeek 已经跑通「万卡级国产算力集群 + 高峰谷差价推动异步作业」的基础设施能力上。同期发布的还有：华为开源 openPangu 2.0 Flash（35B 激活参数、MoE 架构）、稀宇科技开源 MiniMax M3（原生多模态 + 百万词元上下文）、明略科技开源 Octo 多 Agent 协作协议，加上美团 6 月 30 日发布的 LongCat-2.0（1.6 万亿参数、全栈国产芯片训练），中国开源模型阵营在 2026 上半年完成从「跟随者」到「基础设施提供方」的转型。
articles.content_en: The industry significance of DeepSeek V4's peak-valley pricing exceeds the pricing itself. For the past three years, the mainstream China LLM API model was 「flat pricing + undifferentiated pay-per-token」, and price wars dominated the 2024-2025 landscape. V4 is the first attempt at 「time-of-use dynamic pricing」, mirroring classic dispatch tactics from power grids and cloud spot instances—peak-hour price hikes suppress non-urgent calls, while off-peak discounts monetize idle compute. This mechanism's feasibility rests on DeepSeek's proven infrastructure: 10,000+ card domestic compute clusters plus peak-valley spreads driving async workload adoption. Concurrent releases: Huawei open-sourced openPangu 2.0 Flash (35B active params, MoE architecture); MiniMax open-sourced flagship M3 (native multi-modal + million-token context); Minglue Tech open-sourced Octo multi-agent collaboration protocol; and Meituan's June 30 release of LongCat-2.0 (1.6T params, full-stack domestic-chip training). China's open-source model camp completes its H1 2026 pivot from 「follower」 to 「infrastructure provider」.

articles.title: Together AI 完成 8 亿美元 C 轮融资：AI 运行层估值 83 亿的产业信号
articles.title_en: Together AI Closes $800M Series C at $8.3B: A Signal for the AI Runtime Layer
articles.summary: 7 月 1 日 Together AI 宣布完成 8 亿美元 C 轮融资，投后估值 83 亿美元。这是围绕开源模型搭建的 AI 云平台，连接上游 GPU 算力、中游开源模型（Llama、DeepSeek、Kimi、MiniMax）和下游企业应用，提供训练、微调、推理与部署一站式服务。资本给出更高估值背后是清晰的产业趋势：开源模型正在更大范围进入企业环境，围绕开源模型的运行平台开始具备独立价值。这也是继 Anyscale、Fireworks 之后又一个通过「开源模型 + GPU 云」组合突围的 AI 运行层玩家。
articles.summary_en: On July 1, Together AI announced an $800M Series C at $8.3B post-money. It's an AI cloud platform built around open-source models—connecting upstream GPU compute, midstream open models (Llama, DeepSeek, Kimi, MiniMax), and downstream enterprise applications, offering training, fine-tuning, inference, and deployment as one-stop service. The higher valuation reflects a clear industry trend: open-source models are entering enterprise environments at scale, and the runtime platforms around them are gaining independent value. This is another player—alongside Anyscale and Fireworks—breaking through with the 「open-source model + GPU cloud」 combo in the AI runtime layer.
articles.source: Together AI 官方 / 刀客 Doc / 头条科技 / TechCrunch
articles.source_en: Together AI official / Daoke Doc / Toutiao Tech / TechCrunch
articles.content: Together AI 的位置介于三层之间——上游 GPU 算力、中游开源模型、下游企业应用——它把底层 GPU 资源、模型框架、调度系统、推理服务和开发者工具整合起来，让企业更顺畅地把开源模型放进实际业务。相比闭源大模型公司需要自建模型 + 自建云 + 自建应用「三线并行」，AI 运行层玩家的商业模式更接近传统 SaaS 的「一横切多个用户」——毛利率、复购率、客户留存都更容易预测。资本给到 83 亿美元估值的核心逻辑是：GPU 需求从头部模型公司向 AI 应用公司和企业客户下沉，AI 云平台承担了「需求聚合器」的角色，分散的算力需求被集中起来再转化为对 GPU、服务器、网络设备、机柜和电力资源的统一采购。同期同类玩家动态：CoreWeave 4 月与 Meta 签下 210 亿美元 AI 云容量长约；Fireworks 3 月完成 5 亿美元 D 轮估值 60 亿；国内硅基流动 6 月 20 亿人民币 B 轮估值超 100 亿。
articles.content_en: Together AI sits at the intersection of three layers—upstream GPU compute, midstream open-source models, downstream enterprise applications—integrating GPU resources, model frameworks, scheduling systems, inference services, and developer tools so enterprises can plug open-source models into real business more smoothly. Compared to closed-source model companies that must build model + cloud + app in parallel, runtime-layer players' business model is closer to traditional SaaS's 「one horizontal serving many customers」—gross margin, repurchase rate, and customer retention are all more predictable. The core logic behind the $8.3B valuation: GPU demand is trickling down from frontier model companies to AI application companies and enterprises, and AI cloud platforms play the 「demand aggregator」 role, consolidating dispersed compute demand into unified procurement of GPUs, servers, network gear, racks, and power. Peer moves in the same period: CoreWeave signed $21B AI cloud capacity with Meta in April; Fireworks closed a $500M Series D at $6B in March; China's SiliconFlow raised RMB 2B in a Series B in June at over RMB 10B.

articles.title: 2026 上半年国内 AI 融资 3076.82 亿元：1600 家机构入局，红杉、高瓴、奇绩坛列头三家
articles.title_en: China H1 2026 AI Financing Hits RMB 307.68B: 1,600+ Institutions Enter, Sequoia/Hillhouse/MiraclePlus Top 3
articles.summary: IT 桔子 7 月 3 日数据：2026 年 1-6 月国内 AI 赛道股权融资 1203 起、融资金额突破 3076.82 亿元，远超 2025 年全年（约 400 亿元），同比翻近 8 倍。参与投资机构超 1600 家，其中 60 家出手 ≥10 次，是全赛道 25.4% 交易量的核心贡献者。头部机构：红杉中国、高瓴创投并列 43 次出手，奇绩创坛 40 次，北京国管 37 次，英诺基金 36 次，深创投、百度风投并列 27 次。地域上北上杭深四城贡献 73.89% 总交易数、垄断 86% 融资规模；北京 955.17 亿领跑，杭州 DeepSeek 510 亿单笔一举反超上海。
articles.summary_en: According to IT Juzi's July 3 data, China's H1 2026 AI equity financing recorded 1,203 events totaling RMB 307.68B—vastly exceeding the full year of 2025 (~RMB 40B) and up nearly 8x YoY. Over 1,600 institutions participated, with 60 making ≥10 investments—accounting for 25.4% of all deal volume. Top institutions: Sequoia China and Hillhouse Capital tied at 43 investments, MiraclePlus at 40, Beijing Guoguan at 37, Innovation Angel Fund at 36, ShenzhenCapital and Baidu Ventures tied at 27. Geographically, the four hubs of Beijing/Shanghai/Hangzhou/Shenzhen account for 73.89% of deal count and 86% of funding volume; Beijing leads with RMB 95.5B; Hangzhou surpassed Shanghai on the back of DeepSeek's single RMB 51B round.

articles.source_en: IT Juzi / 36Kr / Jixin Monthly / Xiniu Data / Caixin
articles.content: 2026 上半年国内 AI 融资出现四大结构性变化。第一，融资规模半年反超 2025 全年 7 倍——3 月起单月维持 400 亿元以上、6 月单月突破 1000 亿元（主因 DeepSeek 510 亿元首轮落地）。第二，头部集中度极高——TOP20 项目占融资总额约 51%，DeepSeek / 阶跃星辰 / Kimi 三家分别 510 / 230 / 189 亿元领跑大模型阵营，具身智能「七武士」（自变量、智平方、千寻智能、极佳视界、星海图、银河通用、星动纪元）合计 282.26 亿元占 TOP20 的 18%，AIGC 应用「三剑客」（生数、Sand.ai、LiblibAI）与爱诗合计 67.78 亿元。第三，投资机构分四梯队——60 家 ≥10 次为全赛道核心玩家，130 家 5-9 次为细分赛道中坚，其余 1400 家为长尾机构。第四，地域集中北上杭深四城 —— 北京 321 起 / 955 亿领跑，杭州 DeepSeek 单笔反超上海 / 深圳，长三角集聚效应显著。
articles.content_en: China's H1 2026 AI financing shows four structural shifts. First, half-year financing overtook 2025's full year by 7x—monthly volume held above RMB 40B from March, breaking RMB 100B in June (driven mainly by DeepSeek's RMB 51B first round). Second, top concentration is extreme—TOP 20 projects account for ~51% of total; DeepSeek/Stepfun/Kimi lead the model camp at RMB 51B/23B/18.9B respectively; the embodied-AI 「Seven Samurai」 (X-Humanoid, ZhiPingfang, Chaser AI, JiaVis, StarSea Diagram, Galbot, StarDynamics) collectively raised RMB 28.226B (18% of TOP 20); the AIGC application 「Three Musketeers」 (Vidu, Sand.ai, LiblibAI) plus Aicheer totaled RMB 6.778B. Third, investors split into four tiers—60 with ≥10 deals as core players, 130 with 5-9 deals as deep-vertical mainstays, remaining 1,400 in the long tail. Fourth, geographic concentration in Beijing/Shanghai/Hangzhou/Shenzhen—Beijing leads with 321 deals/RMB 95.5B; Hangzhou's single DeepSeek round put it ahead of Shanghai/Shenzhen; Yangtze Delta clustering is pronounced.
key_points: H1 2026 国内 AI 融资 1203 起、3076.82 亿元，同比翻近 8 倍
60 家机构出手 ≥10 次为核心：红杉 / 高瓴各 43、奇绩 40
TOP20 项目占 51%：DeepSeek / 阶跃 / Kimi 领跑大模型
具身智能「七武士」合计 282 亿元，占 TOP20 的 18%
北上杭深四城贡献 73.89% 交易数与 86% 融资规模
key_points_en: H1 2026 AI financing: 1,203 events, RMB 307.68B—up nearly 8x YoY
60 institutions with ≥10 deals form the core: Sequoia/Hillhouse 43 each, MiraclePlus 40
TOP 20 = 51% of total; DeepSeek/Stepfun/Kimi lead the model camp
Embodied-AI 「Seven Samurai」 total RMB 28.2B, 18% of TOP 20

hero.summary: 2026 年 7 月 8 日 AI 产业三条主线同一天交汇。第一，X 账号 @HarshithLucky3 于 7 月 6 日凌晨爆料：谷歌 Gemini 3.5 Pro 将于 7 月 17 日发布，200 万 Tokens 上下文（是 GPT-5.6 / Claude Fable 5 的 2 倍）、原生深度思考推理模式、在 LMSYS Chatbot Arena SVG 编码任务上反超 Claude Fable 5 High、内部代号 Cappuccino、同步上线全时 Agent Spark——三巨头正面交火 30 天窗口期开启。第二，摩根士丹利首席美股策略师 Michael Wilson 团队 7 月 6 日发布《AI：十条投资真相》——四力共振 / 摩尔定律失效 / Token 经济 / 代理时代 / 软件护城河 / Runtime AI / $4T 资本开支 / 中美平行 / 治理落后 / 最大赢家未诞生 10 条判断，把 AI 投资从「买芯片」推向「买云」。第三，李开复 7 月 7 日下午亲自出席万策 AI 品牌媒体发布会，一次发布老板 AI / 销冠 AI / 投资官 AI 三款一号位 Agent，走访 200 位 CEO 后的中国版 Palantir 路径，零一万物内部使用后订单额 +5 倍、商机转化率 +2 倍。三条主线合起来，勾画出 AI 产业下一个 12 个月的正面竞争与资本重塑地图。
hero.summary_en: On July 8, 2026, three AI industry threads converge in a single day. First, X account @HarshithLucky3 leaked on July 6 that Google Gemini 3.5 Pro will launch on July 17 with 2 million tokens context (2x GPT-5.6 and Claude Fable 5), native deep-thinking reasoning, and — most notably — beating Claude Fable 5 High on LMSYS Chatbot Arena SVG coding tasks; internal codename Cappuccino, with the all-time Agent Spark launching alongside. A 30-day frontier-war window opens. Second, Morgan Stanley Chief US Equity Strategist Michael Wilson's team published 'AI: Ten Investment Truths' on July 6 — four-force convergence, Moore's Law failure, Token Economy, Agent Era, software moat rewrite, Runtime AI, $4T capex, US-China parallel, governance lag, biggest winner not yet born — pushing AI investing from 'buy chips' to 'buy cloud.' Third, Kai-Fu Lee personally attended the 01.AI Wance AI brand media launch on July 7 afternoon, unveiling three CEO-tier Agents in a single event: Boss AI, Sales Ace AI, and Investor AI — a China-Palantir path forged from interviews with 200+ CEOs; 01.AI's own use of Sales Ace AI drove 5x order volume and 2x pipeline conversion. Together, these three threads map out the frontier competition and capital repricing of the next 12 months.
